Uniswap v4 hook that embeds reputation-gated AI agents into every swap. DATA FLOW: \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  [Offchain Agent]      observes pending swap in mempool      runs MEV detection / fee optimization      signs AgentIntent{swapId, mevFlag, feeOverrideBps, timestamp}      calls registerIntent() \u2014 lands in block N-1  [Block N \u2014 PoolManager calls hook]      beforeSwap():          1. reads pool config \u2192 gets assignedAgentId          2. calls ERC-8004 ReputationRegistry.getScore(agentId)          3. if score < minRepScore \u2192 revert (agent not qualified)          4. reads pendingIntents[swapId]          5. if mevFlag=true \u2192 revert MEVDetected (sandwich blocked)          6. if feeOverrideBps set \u2192 return as lpFeeOverride      afterSwap():          1. computes slippage saved vs baseline fee          2. computes agentFee = amountIn * agentFeeBps / 10000          3. transfers USDC to agent wallet (ERC-8183 settlement simulation)          4. calls ERC-8004 ReputationRegistry.recordEvent(agentId, jobId, perfScore)          5. emits AgentSettled \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/AgentSwapHook.sol":"AgentSwapHook"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"contracts/AgentSwapHook.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd8dec13f188b81d96f32be17885b1b492f22eeec8f05099e79bfe1a280d1be31","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://758bc4fa5aa689d77720ce3c73764a24993fffa27796f908c61190a343496cb9","dweb:/ipfs/QmZYkat1zQEc9xkeWmaatLqhwoz87RbZpUuLUBqnSEUTqZ"]},"contracts/interfaces/IERC8004.sol":{"keccak256":"0x68692779b65c41e544fe16dc92f94855c33544eceefd6ed9ae7d8b1965a0c152","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f62c33e03dad910749099c88b2d847a3389408b9c69d80d5e4005ad21edb2973","dweb:/ipfs/QmPghPChSmcLg8zbQ2q5CUPVoGYhzxXMWbjDgwVTK6ybRQ"]},"contracts/interfaces/IUniswapV4.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8e8e42fb463ce29c79df82f71d5e9a4dcdc89df5978c868312f0809513d0c232","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cd299d1df587f9dd45d04d924a108c69e99ebf7d3219668a2924420fee24f93c","dweb:/ipfs/QmbgKfC7x9oLXpgJkotcbFMSLQ5FneP9KLJcrzADJMc8Mj"]}},"version":1}
